crons.comment: 0. Fetch tonight's box scores from ESPN (12:10 AM EDT / 11:10 PM EST = 4:10 UTC)
1. Grade tonight's props BEFORE they get deleted (12:20 AM EDT / 11:20 PM EST = 4:20 UTC)
2. Fetch tomorrow's props — replaces tonight's (12:30 AM EDT / 11:30 PM EST = 4:30 UTC)
3. Enrich tomorrow's props with confidence scores (12:45 AM EDT / 11:45 PM EST = 4:45 UTC)
4. Re-fetch box scores (catches late West Coast games) (9:55 AM EDT / 8:55 AM EST = 13:55 UTC)
5. Morning re-grade with final box scores (10:00 AM EDT / 9:00 AM EST = 14:00 UTC)
5. Refresh today's props if any lines moved overnight (10:15 AM EDT / 9:15 AM EST = 14:15 UTC)
6. Re-enrich with updated lines (10:30 AM EDT / 9:30 AM EST = 14:30 UTC)
